center.name: Mexiana
center.summary: Mexiana是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Scaled spinetail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The scaled spinetail is endemic to the east Amazon River in Brazil, ranging from extreme eastern Amazonas, eastern to southern Amapá and Mexiana Island in Pará. It inhabits flooded tropical evergreen forest, restricted to the undergrowth and midstory of Brazilian várzea forests (seasonally flooded forests). It ranges from 0–200 m elevation
